links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The chapada flycatcher is found in central and southwestern Brazil from Maranhão south and west through Tocantins, Mato Grosso, Goiás, Minas Gerais, and Mato Grosso do Sul into extreme eastern Santa Cruz Department in Bolivia
